Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 26 

CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 

LABEL: CHIP Enrollment Days — Total in Year 

DESCRIPTION: Number of days of CHIP enrollment in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 

LONG NAME: CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0–366 
Null/missing = source value is missing
